action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 13 completed training in ~91 minutes (10M steps) with oversampled hard environments, features_dim=1024, net_arch=[1024,512], ent_coef=0.01, and 8-frame stack. The best success rate so far is 49.6% from iter_8. Analysis: I need to know whether the oversampling strategy and increased capacity improved performance on the previously 0% environments (KeyCorridor, LockedRoom, UnlockPickup, MultiRoom). With only ~1.1 hours remaining, I cannot start another long training run without first measuring this checkpoint. Decision: Submit evaluation immediately for the iter_13 checkpoint.
